```{r pvalue_comparison_helpers}
          x = .data[[method_pair[1]]],
          y = .data[[method_pair[2]]]
        )
    }) %>%
    filter(is.finite(x), is.finite(y), x > 0, y > 0)

  if (nrow(pair_df) == 0) {
    stop("No positive finite p-value pairs available for log-scaled plotting.")
  }

  pvalue_limits <- range(c(pair_df$x, pair_df$y), na.rm = TRUE)

  ggplot(pair_df, aes(x = x, y = y)) +
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, color = "gray60") +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 1.5) +
    facet_wrap(~ comparison) +
    scale_x_log10(limits = pvalue_limits) +
    scale_y_log10(limits = pvalue_limits) +
    coord_equal() +
    labs(x = "p-value, method 1",
         y = "p-value, method 2") +
    theme_bw()
}

plot_diffnet_pvalues_by_association_difference <- function(
    pval_long,
    method_order = c("empirical", "unconstrained", "constrained", "fisher")) {
  method_labels <- c(
    empirical = "Empirical",
    unconstrained = "GPD unconstrained",
    constrained = "GPD constrained",
    fisher = "Fisher test"
  )

  zero_counts <- pval_long %>%
    group_by(method) %>%
    summarise(
      n_zero = sum(p_value == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_total = sum(!is.na(p_value)),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      method = factor(method, levels = method_order),
      method_label = paste0(
        method_labels[as.character(method)],
        "\n(zeros: ", n_zero, " / ", n_total, ")"
      )
    ) %>%
    arrange(method) %>%
    mutate(method = as.character(method))

  plot_df <- pval_long %>%
    left_join(zero_counts %>% select(method, method_label), by = "method") %>%
    mutate(
      method = factor(method, levels = method_order),
      method_label = factor(method_label, levels = zero_counts$method_label),
      significant_BH = !is.na(p_adjust) & p_adjust < 0.05,
      point_color = if_else(
        significant_BH,
        association_color,
        "gray65"
      )
    ) %>%
    filter(
      is.finite(association_difference),
      is.finite(p_value),
      p_value >= 0
    )

  if (nrow(plot_df) == 0) {
    stop("No finite non-negative p-values available for log-scaled plotting.")
  }

  positive_pvalues <- plot_df$p_value[plot_df$p_value > 0]
  if (length(positive_pvalues) == 0) {
    stop("At least one positive p-value is needed to define the log scale.")
  }
  
  min_positive_pvalue <- min(positive_pvalues, na.rm = TRUE)
  max_positive_pvalue <- max(positive_pvalues, na.rm = TRUE)
  zero_pvalue_position <- min_positive_pvalue / 10
  y_lower_limit <- zero_pvalue_position / 1.5
  y_breaks <- c(
    zero_pvalue_position,
    10^seq(
      floor(log10(min_positive_pvalue)),
      ceiling(log10(max_positive_pvalue))
    )
  )
  y_breaks <- y_breaks[
    y_breaks >= zero_pvalue_position &
      y_breaks <= max_positive_pvalue
  ]

  plot_df <- plot_df %>%
    mutate(
      p_value_plot = if_else(
        p_value == 0,
        zero_pvalue_position,
        p_value
      )
    )

  ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = association_difference, y = p_value_plot)) +
    geom_point(
      aes(color = point_color),
      alpha = 0.65,
      size = 1.4
    ) +
    facet_wrap(~ method_label, nrow = 1) +
    scale_color_identity() +
    scale_y_log10(
      limits = c(y_lower_limit, max_positive_pvalue),
      expand = c(0, 0),
      breaks = y_breaks,
      minor_breaks = NULL,
      labels = if_else(
        y_breaks == zero_pvalue_position,
        "0",
        scales::label_scientific(digits = 1)(y_breaks)
      )
    ) +
    labs(
      x = "Difference between associations",
      y = "p-value"
    ) +
    theme_bw()
}
```

### diffnet P-Values

```{r diffnet_raw_pvalue_comparison, fig.width=10, fig.height=5, dpi=250}
diffnet_pvalues_long <- extract_diffnet_pvalues(
  palette = "Spectral"
)

diffnet_pvalue_summary <- diffnet_pvalues_long %>%
  group_by(method) %>%
  summarise(
    n = sum(is.finite(p_value)),
    n_zero = sum(p_value == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    min = min(p_value, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_positive = {
      positive_pvalues <- p_value[is.finite(p_value) & p_value > 0]
      if (length(positive_pvalues) == 0) {
        NA_real_
      } else {
        min(positive_pvalues)
      }
    },
    q25 = quantile(p_value, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    median = median(p_value, na.rm = TRUE),
    q75 = quantile(p_value, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    max = max(p_value, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

diffnet_pvalue_summary

plot_diffnet_pvalues_by_association_difference(
  diffnet_pvalues_long,
  method_order = c("empirical", "unconstrained", "constrained", "fisher")
)
```

### netCompare Centrality P-Values

```{r netcompare_centrality_raw_pvalue_comparison, fig.width=10, fig.height=6, dpi=250}
netcompare_centrality_pvalues_long <- extract_centrality_pvalues(
  comp_emp = comp_ebf_emp_noBH,
  comp_unconstr = comp_ebf_GPD_noConstr_noBH,
  comp_constr = comp_ebf_GPD_constr_noBH
)

netcompare_centrality_pvalue_summary <- netcompare_centrality_pvalues_long %>%
  group_by(measure, method) %>%
  summarise(
    n = sum(is.finite(p_value)),
    min = min(p_value, na.rm = TRUE),
    q25 = quantile(p_value, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    median = median(p_value, na.rm = TRUE),
    q75 = quantile(p_value, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    max = max(p_value, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

netcompare_centrality_pvalue_summary

plot_pvalue_pairs(
  netcompare_centrality_pvalues_long,
  id_cols = c("measure", "taxon"),
  method_order = c("empirical", "unconstrained", "constrained")
) +
  facet_grid(measure ~ comparison)
```

## Files Written

```{r list-files-target}
projthis::proj_dir_info(path_target(), recursive = TRUE)
```
